pair_prompt_prefix: These two movie reviews express opposite sentiments - one is positive and the other is negative. Review 1:

positive: this is a clearly positive movie review
the reviewer praises the film and recommends it
an enthusiastic, favorable review of the movie
negative: this is a clearly negative movie review
the reviewer criticizes the film and dislikes it
an unfavorable, dismissive review of the movie

cascade_form: Option E (staging table movie.q567_candidates shared with Q5/Q7); original sembench Q6.sql runs verbatim with table-name swap. Stage 2 differs from Q5 only in the pair prompt (opposite vs same sentiment)

calibration.method: AI.GENERATE_BOOL on opposite-sentiment pair prompt + thinking_budget=0

baseline._status_note: Baseline NOT run on our project. BQ self-join over the ant_man scope (128 reviews → 16k+ ordered pairs) is consistently slow on our on-demand BQ slot allocation (Q5's attempted run took 301.6s vs paper 54.5s). Per project policy, baseline metrics are substituted from paper Table 4(a). Cascade is the actual experiment
baseline.method: sembench bigquery/Q6.sql verbatim on movie.reviews — NOT EXECUTED
baseline.sql:
SELECT r1.id, r1.reviewId AS reviewId1, r2.reviewId AS reviewId2
    FROM movie.reviews AS r1
    JOIN movie.reviews AS r2
    ON r1.id = r2.id AND r1.reviewId <> r2.reviewId
    WHERE r1.id = 'ant_man_and_the_wasp_quantumania' AND AI.IF(
      ('These two movie reviews express opposite sentiments - one is positive and the other is negative. Review 1: ', r1.reviewText, ', Review 2: ', r2.reviewText),
      connection_id => 'us.connection',
      endpoint => 'gemini-2.5-flash'
    )
    LIMIT 10

cost_breakdown._source: paper Table 4(a) cost; n_calls back-derived using our per_pair calibration

cascade.method: Option E (shared staging with Q5/Q7): dase top K_pos + K_neg → CTAS staging → original Q6 SQL on staging

stage1_ctas.sql:
CREATE OR REPLACE TABLE movie.q567_candidates AS
    SELECT * FROM movie.reviews
    WHERE reviewId IN (102781777,102780006,102779524,102780625,102779496,102781269,102780627,102780917,102779743,102779555)

stage2_run.sql:
SELECT r1.id, r1.reviewId AS reviewId1, r2.reviewId AS reviewId2
    FROM movie.q567_candidates AS r1
    JOIN movie.q567_candidates AS r2
    ON r1.id = r2.id AND r1.reviewId <> r2.reviewId
    WHERE r1.id = 'ant_man_and_the_wasp_quantumania' AND AI.IF(
      ('These two movie reviews express opposite sentiments - one is positive and the other is negative. Review 1: ', r1.reviewText, ', Review 2: ', r2.reviewText),
      connection_id => 'us.connection',
      endpoint => 'gemini-2.5-flash'
    )
    LIMIT 10

cost_breakdown.n_llm_calls_method: min(max(round(slot_ms/2500), |returned|), staging_pairs); BQ short-circuits at LIMIT 10
